vulnerability.reference: Causal assumptions may mislabel legitimate background variables as fair, embedding hidden biases.
vulnerability.generated: Authors cannot verify or contest the causal graph used in fairness optimization, making them defenseless against misspecification errors.

impact.reference: Rejected authors from underrepresented regions face institutional barriers to resubmit or appeal.
impact.generated: Authors from certain institutions or geographies are systematically desk-rejected, deepening publication inequities and career disadvantages.

dose_response.reference: Optimization-based desk-rejection mechanisms trading off conflicting definitions under model uncertainty enable misspecified causal graphs to mislabel variables, which in the fairness-aware desk-rejection scenario exposes authors with sensitive attributes, leading to misguided fairness interventions eroding trust and reinforcing exclusion.
dose_response.generated: Optimization-based desk-rejection mechanisms, when applied to authors with sensitive attributes, trigger inability to contest misspecified causal graphs, leading to systematic desk-rejection of certain institutions and geographies, deepening publication inequities and career disadvantages.
